findings.claim_text: Post-trained Nemotron 3 Ultra hit 5.8% all-pass on a held-out slice of Harvey's benchmark, between Sonnet 4.6 (4.2%) and Opus 4.6 (6.6%) on that same slice.
Verified per-token pricing is ~1/6 to ~1/23 cheaper than Sonnet/Opus; the headline's 1/50 is not charged by any provider today.
Nemotron 3 Ultra is a genuinely open-weight 550B-total / 55B-active MoE model released 4 June 2026 under the permissive Linux Foundation OpenMDW-1.1 license.
